hero.subtitle: I offer websites, landing pages, and AI projects for clients — from simple one-pagers to full web apps and chatbots.

website.description: Full-stack web applications built with modern frameworks. From landing pages to complex web platforms, I create fast, responsive, and scalable solutions.

chatbot.title: Support Chatbot Demo
chatbot.subtitle: A preview of an AI-powered support bot. In a real project, this connects to your knowledge base and APIs.
chatbot.botGreeting: Hi! I'm a demo support bot. Ask me anything — in a real integration I'd use your docs and tools to help.
chatbot.userExample: How do I reset my password?
chatbot.botReply: In a live deployment I'd look up your help docs and reply here. This demo shows the UI; the backend would use RAG + your API.
chatbot.demoNotice: Demo UI — connect your API to enable live chat
